commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: There is no tie of affinity and friendship so proper, and so becoming man, as that made by faith in Christ, and strengthened by charity. (Tirinus)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Now He had in precisely similar terms rejected His mother or His brethren, whilst preferring those who heard and obeyed God.
